mapper.select: SELECT * FROM songs ORDER BY createdAt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO songs (artistId, albumId, title, coverUrl, coverNetworkUrl, fileUrl, duration, external_source, external_id, lyrics, lyrics_url, pic_id) VALUES (#{artistId}, #{albumId}, #{title}, #{coverUrl}, #{coverNetworkUrl}, #{fileUrl}, #{duration}, #{externalSource}, #{externalId}, #{lyrics}, #{lyricsUrl}, #{picId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM songs WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
SELECT * FROM songs WHERE artistId = #{artistId} ORDER BY createdAt DESC

SELECT s.id, s.title, s.coverUrl, s.coverNetworkUrl, s.duration, s.external_source AS externalSource, s.external_id AS externalId, s.fileUrl, GROUP_CONCAT( a.name ORDER BY sa.is_main DESC, a.name ASC SEPARATOR ', ' ) AS artistName FROM songs s LEFT JOIN song_artist sa ON s.id = sa.song_id LEFT JOIN artists a ON sa.artist_id = a.id WHERE s.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') GROUP BY s.id, s.title, s.coverUrl, s.coverNetworkUrl, s.duration, s.external_source, s.external_id, s.fileUrl LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM songs WHERE external_source = #{externalSource} AND external_id = #{externalId} LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id, s.title, s.coverUrl, s.coverNetworkUrl, s.duration, s.albumId, s.external_source AS externalSource, s.external_id AS externalId, s.fileUrl, COALESCE(alb.name, '') AS albumName, GROUP_CONCAT( a.name ORDER BY sa.is_main DESC, a.name ASC SEPARATOR ', ' ) AS artistName FROM songs s INNER JOIN song_artist sa ON s.id = sa.song_id INNER JOIN artists a ON sa.artist_id = a.id LEFT JOIN albums alb ON s.albumId = alb.id WHERE s.id IN ( SELECT song_id FROM song_artist WHERE artist_id = #{artistId} ) GROUP BY s.id, s.title, s.coverUrl, s.coverNetworkUrl, s.duration, s.albumId, s.external_source, s.external_id, s.fileUrl, alb.name ORDER BY s.createdAt DESC
SELECT * FROM songs WHERE albumId = #{albumId} ORDER BY createdAt ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE songs SET albumId = #{albumId}, coverUrl = #{coverUrl} WHERE id = #{songId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.* FROM songs s INNER JOIN song_artist sa ON s.id = sa.song_id INNER JOIN artists a ON sa.artist_id = a.id WHERE s.title = #{title} AND a.name = #{artistName} AND sa.is_main = 1 LIMIT 1
